github.description: Authenticated call to the GitHub API (https://api.github.com). Provide method + path (+ optional JSON body). Example path: repos/OWNER/REPO/commits?per_page=5

path.description: path after the host, e.g. repos/owner/repo/issues

example_bearer.description: Pattern: an API that authenticates with a Bearer token (host injects it).

example_query_auth.description: Pattern: an API that authenticates with a ?api_key= query param (host adds it).

example_basic_auth.description: Pattern: an API using HTTP Basic auth (key as username, empty password).
